Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT SUTTER VISITING NURSE ASSOCIATION AND HOSPICE DBA SUTTER CARE AT HOME's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Sutter Visiting Nurse Association and Hospice's motion to compel arbitration is granted on the terms set forth below (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
